title: if let Some(Value::Object) = Some(patch) should be if let Value::Object = patch
description: jmap.rs space_set update loop: 'if let Some(Value::Object(patch_map)) = Some(patch)'. Wrapping in Some() just to reach into Value::Object forces a reader to wonder why Some() is there and whether None is possible (it cannot be, since Some(patch) is always Some). Rewrite as: 'if let Value::Object(patch_map) = patch { ... } else { not_updated.insert(...) }'. Same semantics, no unnecessary wrapping.
